title: Datasheet for ERA5 reanalysis
context: Flagship reanalysis; Copernicus licence permits derivatives + commercial use with attribution. Publisher: Copernicus Climate Change Service (C3S) / ECMWF. Source license: Copernicus licence (first-pass: permits derivatives — confirm at the gate). Candidate catalog id: cat-climate-002.
objective: Produce a documentation datasheet for "ERA5 reanalysis": a data dictionary, provenance + attribution, a license record, a Datasheet-for-Datasets writeup, Croissant metadata, and a small validation script. Documentation only — never host, transform, or republish the data.
acceptanceCriteria: Source license verified to permit derivatives (cite the exact clause/URL) and recorded; per-dataset gate artifact attached
PII pass: no personal/identifying fields documented or sampled; bounded-access protocol followed (header/streamed reads, <=1000-row sample, local-only, ephemeral)
Data dictionary: every field documented (name, type, units, allowed values, null handling) from the sample
Provenance + required attribution + license snapshot (hash + archived copy of the license text) recorded
Datasheet-for-Datasets writeup completed and a Croissant (JSON-LD) metadata file produced and schema-valid
A small validation script + a data-quality report; documentation only — the dataset is never hosted, mirrored, or republished
